_comment: LAZ regression: read LAZ-compressed pcpatches from test_laz_plugin
(set up by examples/test_lazperf.sql), decode through libpc.a's
pc_patch_lazperf_from_wkb path, and dump the points to CSV.
Expected output: 5 lines (X, Y, Z, time_t) with the values from
the SQL fixture. Bit-exact preservation depends on the schema's
scale (0.01) — values come back to the user as floats with 2 dp.

pipeline.query: SELECT (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM t)*1000000)::bigint AS t, pcp, PC_PCId(pcp) AS pcid FROM test_laz_plugin ORDER BY id
